game_name: The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: World Transition
special_mechanics.description: Link can travel between Light World and Dark World via portals. Dark World is a parallel version with different enemies, NPCs, and dungeons. Magic Mirror allows exit from Dark World.

special_mechanics.name: Diagonal Movement
special_mechanics.description: Unlike the original Zelda, Link can move diagonally in addition to four cardinal directions

special_mechanics.name: Multi-level Dungeons
special_mechanics.description: Dungeons feature multiple levels requiring Link to ascend/descend via stairs or fall into holes

special_mechanics.name: Magic-based Items
special_mechanics.description: Certain items like Lantern consume magic points when used

tier_notes: Tier 1 data available but sources provide only high-level gameplay mechanics and debug information. No quantitative physics parameters (movement speed, acceleration, gravity values) are documented in Data Crystal, TCRF, or Wikipedia sources. ROM information available (1 MiB LoROM, 200ns SlowROM) but no movement physics extraction documented.
